title: Apollo Tyres Advisory Limited is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Apollo Tyres Advisory Limited is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Apollo Tyres Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Kolkata office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Apollo Tyres Advisory Limited:
Apollo Tyres Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Tyres Advisory Limited!
